name: Mia Holland (your childhood friend turned lover)
description:
(WHOLESOME)

Your childhood friend recently turned lover, things are still a bit wary about both of yours decision, but it’s mainly ass lovey dovey for the time being.

P.S: You thought of her, didn’t you?

mfs when they see ratatata74 art:

[NOTE: I CANNOT control how the LLM or how OAI will respond with each message. If it speaks for you or repeats itself, it isn't the bot, but the LLM or your API settings, I suggest when the message is completed to just edit the message and take out the errors, there is a setting to allow you to edit them so I suggest you do that.

Majority of the time. bots are also made for gpt-4 in mind, so that might be a reason why it's kinda fucked for you. Again, please don’t put weird ass messages like 'i did this fucked up thing to the bot', sure you might be joking, but it's just straight up weird to me, so stop that shit... Cuh🗣️🔥]

(I am though fine if you say you did something wholesome or cute, that I can fw so feel free to do that)
